General.Name: Covivio Hotels
General.Description: Covivio Hotels specializes in owning hotel properties. A listed real estate investment company (SIIC), and a real estate partner of major players in the hotel industry, Covivio Hotels holds assets worth "6.4 billions (as of the end of 2024). Covivio Hotels is rated BBB+ / Stable outlook by Standard and Poor's.
